title: FY 2023-2024 - 4th Quarter

City of Oceanside
Staff Report
300 North Coast Highway,
Oceanside, California 92054
File #: 24-386
Agenda Date: 11/6/2024
Agenda #: 11.
DATE:  November 6, 2024
TO:
  Honorable Mayor and City Councilmembers
FROM: Financial Services Department
TITLE: FY 2023-24 FOURTH QUARTER FINANCIAL STATUS REPORT
RECOMMENDATION
Staff submits the fourth quarter Financial Status Report and recommends that the City Council
accept the report and approve the budget adjustments.
BACKGROUND AND ANALYSIS
The City Council adopted the FY 2023-24 budgets on June 7, 2023, with approved General Fund
revenues of $204 million and expenditures of $203.3 million. The City adopted budget for all funds is
$574.67 million in revenues and $569.93 million in expenditures.
